best_retained_benchmark.caveat: single-group, metastable, 3-day stability at 77 K, deterioration at 200 K

primary_route_next_step.action: Design and launch an independent PQP reproducibility campaign targeting Hg1223
primary_route_next_step.rationale: The 151 K retained-ambient benchmark is single-group; independent confirmation is the most urgent need before lever optimization
campaign_elements: Identify 1-2 independent groups with cuprate high-pressure synthesis capability
Provide the Deng-Chu PQP protocol as a reproducibility package
Define countable evidence requirements: zero-resistance, Meissner, sample-state logging
Set 6-month timeline for first independent attempt

secondary_route_next_step.action: Map the Tc response to epitaxial compressive strain in bilayer La3Ni2O7-class nickelate films at ambient pressure
secondary_route_next_step.rationale: Compressive strain is the most accessible and scalable uplift lever; the ambient-pressure strain response curve is unmapped
campaign_elements: Grow bilayer La3Ni2O7-class films on substrates with varying lattice mismatch
Measure zero-resistance Tc at each strain point
Establish whether Tc-strain relationship is monotonic or has an optimum

primary.criterion: Independent group confirms retained ambient zero-resistance Tc >= 131 K in Hg1223 after PQP, with Meissner verification and sample-state logging

secondary.criterion: Bilayer La3Ni2O7-class film demonstrates ambient zero-resistance Tc > 80 K under optimized epitaxial strain

primary_pivot.trigger: PQP reproduction fails: retained Tc below 131 K or retention not achieved
primary_pivot.action: Fall back to stable 134 K ambient baseline; gap widens to 166 K; evaluate nickelate promotion to co-primary

secondary_promotion.trigger: Any nickelate sub-family demonstrates ambient zero-resistance Tc above 100 K
secondary_promotion.action: Promote nickelates to co-primary with Hg1223

secondary_demotion.trigger: Ambient nickelate Tc improvement stalls below 50 K for more than 6 months
secondary_demotion.action: Demote nickelates to watch-only; operate with Hg-family as sole active route

v6_closeout.outcome: Explicit primary + secondary route program with named candidates, fragility caveats, pivot triggers, and concrete next-step actions
